# CANDIDATE: RSI_DIVERGENCE_BULL_ENTRY_TRIGGER

**Filed:** 2026-05-22  
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)  
**Type:** new_trigger  
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Hypothesis

Bullish RSI divergence (price lower low + RSI higher low) signals imminent trend reversal from bearish to bullish. Currently used only as bear-exit enhancer in RSI_DIVERGENCE_BULL_WATCHER, we test it as primary entry trigger for bullish 0DTE calls. Edge exists because divergence captures weakening momentum before price reversal, providing early entry with favorable risk/reward.

## Mechanism

**Entry:** Trigger when RSI_DIVERGENCE_BULL_WATCHER fires (bullish divergence confirmed on 5m chart). Enter SPY 0DTE ATM or 1st OTM call at mid-price limit.  
**Exit:**  
- TP1: Sell 2/3 contracts at +30% premium OR first major intraday resistance from today-bias.json (whichever first)  
- After TP1: Move runner stop to breakeven + $0.01  
- Runner exit: 3m candle closes back into EMA ribbon OR rejection signature (long upper wick + red follow-through) OR premium ≥ entry × 3.0 OR time stop 15:50 ET  
- Fallback: If runner-exit signal fires before TP1, exit all contracts at signal price  
**Filters:** Standard context filters from BULLISH_RECLAIM_RIDE_THE_RIBBON playbook (time ≥09:35 ET, bullish structure, ribbon spread ≥30c, no volume divergence on reclaim bar, VIX falling/below 17.20, no major news in 30min).

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** qty=28 requires $25K+ account; $1K paper account realizes ~14% of headline P&L due to 50% per-trade risk cap and min 3 contracts.
2. **Sample bias:** 16-month dataset (2025-01-01 to 2026-04-30) split IS (first 12 months: 2025-01-01 to 2025-12-31) and OOS (last 4 months: 2026-01-01 to 2026-04-30). VIX regimes: LOW (<15), MODERATE (15-20), ELEVATED (20-25), HIGH (>25). Selection: all 5m bars meeting divergence criteria. Overfit risk: moderate due to regime stratification reducing spurious correlations.
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS (walk-forward not yet performed; will compute IS/OOS WR and Sharpe ratios per VIX regime post-backtest).
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS (top 3 J days not yet validated with realistic OPRA simulation).
5. **Failure modes:**  
   - Worst day: strong trending months (e.g., April 2025/2026) where divergence fails (WR=33%/0% per leaderboard)  
   - Max drawdown: estimated -40% during prolonged trends if stop-losses hit repeatedly  
   - Blow-up scenario: volatility expansion causing false divergences in choppy markets leading to whipsaw losses  
6. **Concentration:** unknown -- requires Stage-1 backtest (will report top-5 days % of P&L post-analysis).

## Pre-merge gate

- Stage-1 backtest on 16-month data showing edge_capture ≥ 771  
- Walk-forward OOS validation (IS/OOS ratio ≥ 0.5 per VIX regime)  
- Real-fills check on top 3 J days (sim vs real OPRA diff < ±20%)  
- Gym validators pass for new trigger logic  
- OP-20 disclosures completed with actual backtest results

## Confidence

3 / 10 -- Limited validation; leaderboard shows watcher has predictive value (VIX_MOD WR=85.2%) but untested as entry trigger. High overfit risk in trending regimes per failure mode disclosure.

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

Complements RSI_DIVERGENCE_BULL_WATCHER (#11) by testing same signal as entry trigger rather than bear-exit. No conflict with existing candidates; may subsume #11 if proven effective as standalone trigger. Does not affect bearish anchors (J days) directly but could alter engine behavior on bullish days. Requires coordination with BULLISH_RECLAIM_RIDE_THE_RIBBON playbook for exit rules.
